name: Logarithmic Equations and Properties
description: Solving equations and systems of equations involving logarithms, using properties like change of base, product/quotient/power rules.

name: Absolute Value Functions and Inequalities
description: Analyzing functions and solving inequalities involving absolute values, often requiring piecewise definitions or minimization/maximization.

name: Polynomial Roots, Vieta's Formulas, and Symmetric Polynomials
description: Relating polynomial coefficients to sums/products of roots (Vieta's formulas) and using symmetric polynomial identities, especially with complex numbers.

name: Circle Properties (Chords, Tangents, Distances, Intersections)
description: Problems involving various properties of circles, including chords, tangents, radii, distances from points to the center, and intersections.

name: Sequences and Modular Arithmetic
description: Analyzing sequences defined by recurrence relations, finding terms, sums, or remainders using modular arithmetic. Includes properties of powers within sequences.

name: Probability and Counting Techniques
description: Calculating probabilities using combinations, permutations, or other counting methods, often with specific conditions or for biased events.

name: Digit and Base Representation Analysis
description: Problems involving properties of digits of numbers, numbers in different bases, counting numbers with specific digit patterns, or digit manipulation.

name: Volume Calculation of Geometric Solids
description: Calculating volumes of various 3D geometric solids, including cones, polyhedra, and solids formed by folding 2D shapes.

name: Trigonometric Functions Analysis
description: Analyzing and minimizing/maximizing expressions involving trigonometric functions, or relating trigonometric ratios to geometric properties.

name: Triangle Area and Geometric Properties
description: Calculating areas of triangles, often involving specific points (e.g., interior points, midpoints), parallel lines, altitudes, or segment lengths.

name: Arithmetic Progression Sums
description: Calculating sums of terms in an arithmetic progression.

name: System of Equations (Linear and Non-linear)
description: Solving systems of linear or non-linear equations, including large systems.

name: Piecewise Functions
description: Evaluating and analyzing functions defined by different rules over different intervals.

name: Complex Numbers (General Properties)
description: Problems involving general properties of complex numbers, including roots of unity, arguments, and integer constraints.

name: Random Walks on Graphs
description: Calculating probabilities for paths on a graph (e.g., vertices of a tetrahedron) with random choices at each step.

name: Greatest Integer Function
description: Evaluating expressions involving the greatest integer function (floor function).

name: Ellipse Properties (Foci, Tangents, Axes)
description: Problems involving properties of ellipses, including foci, tangents, and lengths of major/minor axes.

name: Integer Approximation and Error Minimization
description: Finding integer approximations to numbers to minimize maximum error.

name: Regular Polygon Properties
description: Problems involving properties of regular polygons, including angles, vertices, and inscribed/circumscribed shapes.

name: Sums with Error Detection
description: Problems involving sums of sequences where an error (e.g., a term added twice) needs to be identified.

name: Sum of Logarithms of Divisors
description: Calculating sums of logarithms of proper divisors of a number.

name: Polynomial Properties (Coefficients, Factors, Roots)
description: Determining coefficients, factors, and integer solutions for polynomials given their form and properties.

name: Coin Toss Subsequences
description: Counting sequences of coin tosses with specific patterns of subsequences (e.g., HH, HT, TH, TT).

name: Difference of Squares
description: Expressing integers as the difference of two squares.

name: Counting Ascending Integers
description: Counting integers where each digit is less than the digit to its right.

name: Ratio Problems
description: Solving problems involving ratios and fractions, often in a context of changes over time.

name: Pascal's Triangle Entry Ratios
description: Finding rows in Pascal's triangle where consecutive entries have a specific ratio.

name: Proper Divisors and 'Nice' Numbers
description: Problems involving proper divisors of integers and defining numbers based on properties of their proper divisors.

name: Unique Integer from Inequalities
description: Finding an integer that is uniquely determined by a set of inequalities.

name: Cube Root Properties
description: Finding integers based on properties of their cube roots.

name: Bubble Pass Probability
description: Calculating probabilities related to the outcome of a 'bubble pass' sorting algorithm on a sequence.

name: Inscribed Squares and Area
description: Properties of squares inscribed in right triangles and their areas.

name: Constrained Arrangements and Permutations
description: Counting permutations or arrangements of objects under specific constraints (e.g., lock combinations, typing orders).

name: Functional Equations
description: Solving problems involving functions defined by a relation, often on ordered pairs, and finding properties of these functions or related polynomial roots.

name: Graph Reflection
description: Analyzing reflections of graphs across lines and finding properties of the resulting equations.

name: Convex Polyhedra and Interior Segments
description: Counting segments joining vertices of a polyhedron that lie in its interior.

name: Mean Line in Complex Plane
description: Properties of a 'mean line' for complex numbers, including y-intercept and slope.

name: Counting Convex Polygons on a Circle
description: Counting the number of distinct convex polygons that can be formed using a subset of points on a circle.

name: Consecutive Integers and Perfect Powers
description: Finding sets of consecutive integers that satisfy conditions related to being perfect squares or cubes.

name: Relative Motion and Meeting Points
description: Problems involving objects moving at different speeds and directions, finding their meeting points or distances traveled.

name: Arithmetic Series and Squares
description: Finding integers such that adding them to a set of numbers results in squares of consecutive terms of an arithmetic series.

name: Euler's Conjecture (Counterexamples)
description: Problems related to famous number theory conjectures, often involving finding specific integers that satisfy or disprove them.

name: Statistics (Mean, Mode, Data Manipulation)
description: Problems combining statistical concepts like mean and mode with data manipulation.

name: Tetrahedron Midpoints and Distances
description: Calculating distances between midpoints of edges in a tetrahedron.

name: Set Theory with Sum/Difference Constraints
description: Counting subsets or pairs of subsets of a set that satisfy conditions on the sum of their elements or differences between elements.

name: Expression Evaluation (Radicals, Series)
description: Direct computation and simplification of complex algebraic expressions, including those with radicals or series.
